name: timesfm-forecasting
tagline: Zero-shot time-series forecasting via Google's TimesFM, with a mandatory RAM/GPU preflight check and CSV/DataFrame forecast workflows.
verdict: Thorough ML forecasting skill: clear scope boundaries, strong preflight/failure-path coverage, and declared tooling. Weak spots: unpinned pip/uv installs of timesfm/torch (supply-chain warning), a real internal contradiction where the same quantile indices are labeled both 60/80% and 80/90% intervals in different sections (risks wrong anomaly thresholds).

highlights.summary: pip/uv install timesfm[torch] and torch>=2.0.0 are unpinned from official PyPI, e.g. line 124 `pip install timesfm[torch]` — well-known but no exact version.
q[:,:,1]/q[:,:,9] are called a '90% prediction interval' (line 239-241) but the canonical table (line 291) labels index 9 as the 80% PI upper bound.
SKILL.md (783 lines) inlines full code for 3 workflows, perf tuning, and validation scripts despite existing references/ and examples/ split points.
